transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigator, this is Alex. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I want to know if a physical therapist I found is covered under my plan.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can check that. Can I get your name and date of birth, please?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Dana. I see you're on the Bright Path Silver PPO plan. What's the provider's name or clinic?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: It's called Riverbend Physical Therapy, on Elm Street.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me check... yes, Riverbend Physical Therapy is in-network with your plan.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh good, that's a relief. Will I still have a copay?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, your plan shows a $30 copay per visit for in-network physical therapy.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, that works. Thank you so much for checking.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Dana. Anything else I can help with today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's everything. Have a good day.
